loops.name: After all, aren't you the OG King of Foul Play who likes to pick at all the loopholes?
loops.description: After all, aren't you the OG King of Foul Play who likes to pick at all the loopholes?

loops.name: Before my regression, I had seen Yoo Soo-ha clear up to the 40th floor.
loops.description: Before my regression, I had seen Yoo Soo-ha clear up to the 40th floor.

loops.name: "  "This time when I went back to Babylon, I searched for all the heretic forces lurking within the Ten Thousand Temple.
loops.description: "  "This time when I went back to Babylon, I searched for all the heretic forces lurking within the Ten Thousand Temple.

loops.name: "  "Kim Gong-ja, you have a regression skill.
loops.description: "  "Kim Gong-ja, you have a regression skill.

loops.name: "  On the day I revealed that I was a regressor, Anastasia had said.
loops.description: "  On the day I revealed that I was a regressor, Anastasia had said.

loops.name: 'Compared to before my regression.
loops.description: 'Compared to before my regression.

loops.name: So even before my regression and after my regression, the last stage humanity had stepped onto was the 40th Floor.
loops.description: So even before my regression and after my regression, the last stage humanity had stepped onto was the 40th Floor.

loops.name: "  -Eh…  "Nevertheless, sometimes, there is garbage that can be recycled.
loops.description: "  -Eh…  "Nevertheless, sometimes, there is garbage that can be recycled.

loops.name: "  -Eh…  "Nevertheless, sometimes, there is garbage that can be recycled.
loops.description: "  -Eh…  "Nevertheless, sometimes, there is garbage that can be recycled.

loops.name: If the elves before my regression were fanatics of the Flame Emperor, the elves of this life were fanatics of mammonism.
loops.description: If the elves before my regression were fanatics of the Flame Emperor, the elves of this life were fanatics of mammonism.

loops.name: "  And praise for the undistorted cycle.
loops.description: "  And praise for the undistorted cycle.

loops.name: Even our tower, when the Black Dragon Master was the second in the the tower rankings, before my regression, didnt we consider the tower as some kind of [game]?
loops.description: Even our tower, when the Black Dragon Master was the second in the the tower rankings, before my regression, didnt we consider the tower as some kind of [game]?

loops.name: The highest floor reached in the world before the regression the 40th floor had already been surpassed.
loops.description: The highest floor reached in the world before the regression the 40th floor had already been surpassed.

loops.name: I remembered the phrase that kept repeating: [You have died].
loops.description: I remembered the phrase that kept repeating: [You have died].

loops.name: I had each group alternately check the security, and promised to cut the budget of any group that found a loophole in half.
loops.description: I had each group alternately check the security, and promised to cut the budget of any group that found a loophole in half.

loops.name: Disappointed, worst ever, I dont know what sins my ears committed in a past life to deserve a performance like yesterdays  a salad of curses and contempt lay there.
loops.description: Disappointed, worst ever, I dont know what sins my ears committed in a past life to deserve a performance like yesterdays  a salad of curses and contempt lay there.

loops.name: Both look delicious, which is a big problem  The Jester, unaware that I had returned to the past, just looked at me blankly.
loops.description: Both look delicious, which is a big problem  The Jester, unaware that I had returned to the past, just looked at me blankly.

loops.name: In a timeline devoured by regression, I had exploited this unwritten rule before.
loops.description: In a timeline devoured by regression, I had exploited this unwritten rule before.

loops.name: Had it been before the regression, I too would have forgotten the memory of just now.
loops.description: Had it been before the regression, I too would have forgotten the memory of just now.

loops.name: Regression.
loops.description: Regression.

loops.name: The fact that Raviel escaped from a future where she became the empress, returned to the past, and where Sylvia captured the princes heart while posing as a mere barons daughter, was [already] a life recreated.
loops.description: The fact that Raviel escaped from a future where she became the empress, returned to the past, and where Sylvia captured the princes heart while posing as a mere barons daughter, was [already] a life recreated.

loops.name: Mutia, the constellation who governs time and regression, knows everything about what kind of human I was before I entered the 4000 days of nirvana- my entire history.
loops.description: Mutia, the constellation who governs time and regression, knows everything about what kind of human I was before I entered the 4000 days of nirvana- my entire history.

loops.name: It read the [story] of me as a human and figured out my regression.
loops.description: It read the [story] of me as a human and figured out my regression.

loops.name: Because Mutia himself is a god dealing with time and regression?
loops.description: Because Mutia himself is a god dealing with time and regression?

loops.name: But what if your life, from the very beginning, was ruined by another regressor!
loops.description: But what if your life, from the very beginning, was ruined by another regressor!

loops.name: Like a grain of sand jamming well-functioning gears, my life gradually changed due to the regressor named the Flame Emperor.
loops.description: Like a grain of sand jamming well-functioning gears, my life gradually changed due to the regressor named the Flame Emperor.

loops.name: When the god overseeing regression rules the world, the ending is an inevitable stop.
loops.description: When the god overseeing regression rules the world, the ending is an inevitable stop.

loops.name: It has strict conditions, but it does contain the power of regression.
loops.description: It has strict conditions, but it does contain the power of regression.

loops.name: For me, who possesses a regression skill, Mutia, [The Constellation of Regression], kneeling is like a general admitting defeat to another general, a musician conceding to another musician, acknowledging my superiority within the same realm.
loops.description: For me, who possesses a regression skill, Mutia, [The Constellation of Regression], kneeling is like a general admitting defeat to another general, a musician conceding to another musician, acknowledging my superiority within the same realm.

loops.name: The very skill of regression you possess was created by none other than me and Hishmith Kritz.
loops.description: The very skill of regression you possess was created by none other than me and Hishmith Kritz.

loops.name: One day, the Lady came to me and said, she wanted to make a regression skill and asked if it was okay.
loops.description: One day, the Lady came to me and said, she wanted to make a regression skill and asked if it was okay.

loops.name: Since regression is my domain, she needed my permission first.
loops.description: Since regression is my domain, she needed my permission first.

loops.name: Regression should be exclusive.
loops.description: Regression should be exclusive.

loops.name: The value of regression lies in the fact that only I know that I have returned to the past.
loops.description: The value of regression lies in the fact that only I know that I have returned to the past.

loops.name: The moment someone else knows that time has been reversed, the value of regression, my power, plummets instantly!
loops.description: The moment someone else knows that time has been reversed, the value of regression, my power, plummets instantly!

loops.name: Even if Yoo Soo-ha had a regression skill, it would have been extremely difficult for him alone to overcome the Sword Saint.
loops.description: Even if Yoo Soo-ha had a regression skill, it would have been extremely difficult for him alone to overcome the Sword Saint.

loops.name: The regression of Mutia, the information of Hishmith Kritz, and what was it, all sorts of constellations I can hardly remember.
loops.description: The regression of Mutia, the information of Hishmith Kritz, and what was it, all sorts of constellations I can hardly remember.

loops.name: The simple cycle that repeats for eternity was the celestial body and object of this world.
loops.description: The simple cycle that repeats for eternity was the celestial body and object of this world.

loops.name: You caught the loophole in the spider web spun by the Tower Master.
loops.description: You caught the loophole in the spider web spun by the Tower Master.

loops.name: Though a soul that has forgotten its past life would not remember.
loops.description: Though a soul that has forgotten its past life would not remember.

loops.name: Your eyes are too bright, not like those of a soul that has forgotten its past life.
loops.description: Your eyes are too bright, not like those of a soul that has forgotten its past life.

loops.name: Whether its Musical Heaven or Golden Heaven, everyone who comes here forgets their previous life.
loops.description: Whether its Musical Heaven or Golden Heaven, everyone who comes here forgets their previous life.

loops.name: Not even a thing of the past but a secret buried in the cycles of time.
loops.description: Not even a thing of the past but a secret buried in the cycles of time.

loops.name: Even if it was my past life, its a life I cant remember.
loops.description: Even if it was my past life, its a life I cant remember.

loops.name: I swung my sword vertically up, then down again, repeating the action and layering aura over aura to create a massive wall.
loops.description: I swung my sword vertically up, then down again, repeating the action and layering aura over aura to create a massive wall.

loops.name: The warrior, who had been repeating the basic movements, paused.
loops.description: The warrior, who had been repeating the basic movements, paused.

loops.description: If you desire regression even more intensely than Mutia, you will be able to freely wield the Heart Sword in Mutias world.

loops.name: Even those who did not meet their fate in their previous life, here, they are bound to meet and be together forever  Theres no end.
loops.description: Even those who did not meet their fate in their previous life, here, they are bound to meet and be together forever  Theres no end.

loops.description: [A Regressors Love].

loops.description: It rose as high as the wave hills allowed before sliding down smoothly, repeating the process.

loops.name: This way, floors one to 49 form one cycle.
loops.description: This way, floors one to 49 form one cycle.

loops.description: And then, the next step is to repeat this cycle on a deeper level.
